chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal Nos. 424, 425 & 426 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 3417/2018. 01.12.2025 None present for the Appellants. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for respondent. Mr. Raja Love Kush, Deputy Manager (Legal), SSGC. These appeals are pending since 2018. Appellants remain unrepresented today without intimation or justification. These appeals are clogging the docket for more than seven years. It appears that the appellants are not interested in proceeding with these appeals, therefore, the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
